description_long: This is a Viking-style horned helmet featuring a dark metallic dome with two large, curved horns extending from either side. The helmet's surface is adorned with decorative rivets and a central raised ridge running from front to back, adding both structural integrity and visual interest. The horns are attached with metallic bands that have a reddish-brown tint, contrasting with the darker main body. Subtle gold-toned engravings and accents are visible on the helmet, particularly along the central ridge and near the horn bases. The lower rim of the helmet is reinforced and slightly flared, providing additional protection and a distinctive silhouette. The interior appears hollow, designed to fit over a person's head, and the overall construction suggests a blend of metal and possibly faux leather or plastic for the horns.
description: A Viking-style helmet with large curved horns, dark metallic dome, and decorative gold accents.
description_view_0: Rear view showing both horns symmetrically, the central ridge, and decorative rivets along the helmet's back.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curvature and attachment of the horns, as well as the gold engravings on the helmet's side.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the helmet's face opening, central ridge, and the full span of both horns.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the horn's attachment and the helmet's flared lower rim.
attribute_graphic_design: Decorative gold engravings and accents along the central ridge and horn bases; otherwise solid colors with metallic and reddish-brown bands.
